'''Rabb''' was a male [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who owed his rise in rank to [[Sien Sovv]]. He protested [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]]'s dismissal of Sovv during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
